name: ai-driven-qa-framework
description: AI-driven QA framework starter (Playwright + TypeScript) — POM + single ActionKeyword layer, qa-agent AI skill, 4 read-first MCP servers, regression + bug HTML/DOCX report generators, Jira-bug auto-reporter, Jenkins CI. Drop into any web project.

scripts.test:sandbox: npx cross-env test_env=sandbox playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:sandbox:refresh: npx cross-env test_env=sandbox refresh=yes playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:uat: npx cross-env test_env=uat playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:uat:refresh: npx cross-env test_env=uat refresh=yes playwright test -c config/playwright.config.ts
scripts.report:all: yarn aiqa:collect && yarn aiqa:diagnose && yarn aiqa:finalize && yarn aiqa:report:html && yarn report:bugs
scripts.allure:report: allure generate test-output/allure-results --clean -o test-output/allure-report && allure open test-output/allure-report
